// crons: Vercel Hobby tier only allows daily crons. We use Supabase pg_cron instead — see supabase/cron.sql. Apply that file in Supabase SQL editor and the schedules below will fire from there: /api/tick every minute, /api/check-replies every 5 minutes, /api/cron/refresh-tokens hourly. To switch back to Vercel-native cron later (Pro plan), restore the `crons` block from git history.
